text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's finally begun! Golshi's ultimate
multiple-choice one-question birthday quiz!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Go on, pick your poison! Is your present in my
right pocket—or my left? I swear upon McQueen's
name that the correct answer is one of these two
choices!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
In other words, the odds are a perfect 50/50...
Heh, now that's more like it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If you're gonna take this lightly, you'd best just
give up. Answer right for the pearly gates, and
wrong for molten lava... Your life's on the line,
and you only got one chance.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: You gotta wager your life—that's what it means to go all in!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Sounds good to me! The pressure's got
every cell in my body on edge!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, my hands are tremblin'! Who woulda
thought I'd be wagerin' my life for my birthday?
You're a real one, Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I knew you wouldn't back down from a challenge.
There's no turning back now, Nakayama! Now
choose—right or left!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whewie! Not bad at all! You got it right, so you
get this carrot-scented eraser!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I gotta thank you, Golshi. Not every day I get to feel thrills like these... Feel like a newborn baby right now.
